findings.issue: Identity fragmentation via zip-file relay creates cross-instance spoofing vectors
findings.recommended_fix: Implement content-hash + timestamp logging to zeus.governance_events for all cross-instance handoffs

findings.issue: Compromise of physical courier enables full system takeover via social engineering/malware
findings.recommended_fix: Deploy end-to-end encryption for all relayed prompts and enforce multi-factor courier authentication

findings.issue: Perspective_name_drift violates Crystal Law 6 by gamifying mastery tasks
findings.recommended_fix: Implement strict name-ownership verification with cryptographic attestation
